schemes.name: Biotechnology Career Advancement And Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme For Women Scientists
schemes.description: Biotechnology Career Advancement and Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme, a special scheme of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Ministry of Science & Technology, the government of India aims to enhance the participation of women scientists in India towards research in Biotechnology.

schemes.name: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Education for meritorious Single Girl Students, who are the only child of their parents; and have passed the CBSE Class 10th Examination with 60% or more marks and are continuing their further school education of Class 11th and 12th.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
schemes.description: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to widows of poor family (BPL)  of the society.

schemes.name: Indo-French Postdoctoral Research Programme for Women in Science
schemes.description: This programme will provide a platform for women candidates to engage & work with Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
schemes.description: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

schemes.name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram
schemes.description: A scheme by Ministry of MoHFW for pregnant women who access government health facilities for their delivery. to absolutely free and no expense delivery, including caesarean section. Essential care is provided to the mother and her neonate within 48 hours.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.description: The scheme aims to reduce maternal and neonatal mortality by promoting institutional deliveries among poor pregnant women. It offers cash assistance for institutional and home deliveries, along with antenatal and postnatal care support, primarily benefiting poor pregnant women across India.

schemes.name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
schemes.description: The scheme âMahila Samman Savings Certificateâ was launched by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance to provide financial security to every girl and woman in India.

schemes.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.
schemes.income_limit: family income is less than Rupees three lakhs per annum

schemes.name: Mission Vatsalya (Child Protection Services and Child Welfare Services)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: This scheme aims to ensure, sustain, and strengthen child protection at the family and community levels, promote family-based non-institutional care, and provide financial support to children in need.
schemes.income_limit: family income is below â¹8 lakh per annum or as prescribed by the Ministry of WCD from time to time

schemes.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar - National Award for Women
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: The award aims to acknowledge the achievements of women & recognize their contributions to society and the nation. The award is conferred annually on individuals in recognition of their exceptional service towards the cause of womenâs empowerment, particularly for vulnerable and marginalized women.

schemes.name: National Award For Senior Citizens (vayoshreshtha Samman): Iconic Mother
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The award is conferred to the eminent and outstanding senior citizens and institutions/organizations involved in rendering distinguished service for the cause of elderly persons, especially indigent senior citizens. The awards are conferred on 1st October every year by the Honâble President of India

schemes.name: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
schemes.description: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

schemes.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to â¹2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.
schemes.income_limit: Family Income** of the Applicant must be Less than **â¹ 3 Lakh per Annum**

schemes.name: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship For Single Girl Child
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme by the University Grants Commission for Girl students who are admitted in the first year of PG courses in any designated university or a postgraduate college, and happen to be the only girl child in the family. The amount of fellowship is â¹ 36,200/- per annum.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: The scheme is to provide maternity benefits to women belonging to socially and economically disadvantaged sections of society. For first child the maternity benefit of â¹5,000 is provided in two instalments under PMMVY and second child, it is â¹6,000 is to be provided subject to second child is girl.
schemes.income_limit: family income is less than Rs

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: The Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar (PMRBP) is organized to celebrate the energy, determination, ability, zeal, and enthusiasm of our children.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide fixed-day assured, comprehensive and quality antenatal care universally to all pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month. It offers free comprehensive antenatal care services at government health facilities.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.description: A scheme by Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas for Providing free LPG connections to women belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.description: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MOPNG), introduced the â"Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana 2.0" in India. The Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana (PMUY) is a scheme launched by the Government of India in 2016 to provide free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) connections to women from below-poverty-line.

schemes.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

schemes.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
schemes.description: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

schemes.name: RMEWF- Financial Assistance to Orphan Children of ESM
schemes.description: Under this scheme, â¹3,000 per month (paid annually) is provided to eligible orphan children of ex-servicemen for educational and settlement support.

schemes.name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Vocational Training Of Widows Of Ex-Servicemen
schemes.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to a widow of Ex-Servicemen to settle in life through vocational training.

schemes.name: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship For Single Girl Child
schemes.description: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child (SJSGC) is a Fellowship Scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education, for pursuing research work leading to the award of a Ph.D. degree. The target group of this scheme is the âsingle girl child'.

schemes.name: Scheme For Adolescent Girls
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: A support scheme by Ministry of Women & Child Development enabling self-development and empowerment of out-of-school adolescent girls, and improving their nutritional, health & hygiene  status. All out-of-school adolescent girls in the 11 to 14 years age group are eligible for this scheme.

schemes.name: Scheme for Supportive Money to the Parents of Transgender Children
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The "Scheme for Supportive Money to the Parents of Transgender Children" aims to provide financial assistance of â¹1,000/- to the parents of transgender children. Transgender persons face stigma and discrimination in almost every sphere of their life including within the group, health facilities.

schemes.name: Scholarship Scheme for Girl Children of Jute Mills / MSMEs Workers
schemes.description: National Jute Board Act, 2008 provides to âsecure better working conditions and provisions and improve amenities and incentives for workers engaged in the jute industry.â

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Fellowship
schemes.description: The SERB - POWER Fellowship is designed to identify and reward excellent women researchers in Indian academic institutions and R&D laboratories, holding Ph.D. degrees in any branch of science and engineering.

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Research Grants
schemes.description: The aim of the âSERB - POWER Research Grantsâ is to encourage emerging and eminent women researchers for individual-centric and competitive mode of research funding to undertake R&D activities in frontier areas of science and engineering.

schemes.name: Surakshit Matritva Aashwasan Yojana
schemes.description: SUMAN Yojana is a maternity benefit initiative by MoH&FW. This program provides affordable and quality healthcare solutions to pregnant women and newborns. The scheme provides zero expense access up to six months after delivery. Upto antenatal check-ups during the 1st trimester are provided.

schemes.name: Technology Development And Utilization Programme For Women
schemes.description: In order to meet the specific needs of women and to enhance the contribution of women towards technology capability building, the âTechnology Development & Utilization Programme for Women (TDUPW)â has been formulated by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR).

schemes.name: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
schemes.description: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

schemes.name: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.description: âWISE Post-Doctoral Fellowshipâ is a new programme of the Department of Science & Technology that aims to provide opportunities to women scientists & technologists between the age group of 27-60 years who want to continue their research as bench-level scientists in basic and applied sciences.

schemes.name: Women Helpline
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.description: Women Helpline provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through telephonic short-code 181 to women

schemes.name: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
schemes.description: The âWISE-SCOPE Fellowshipâ Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

schemes.name: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research
schemes.description: The scheme âWomen Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER)â aims to build scientific capacity, retain and promote women researchers in India & Germany by utilizing complementary expertise in science, technology, innovation and research partnerships.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
schemes.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
schemes.description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

schemes.name: Womenâs Instinct for Developing and Ushering in Scientific Heights & Innovation
schemes.description: 'WIDUSHI' programme aims to encourage and support senior women scientists to conduct research in interdisciplinary areas of Science and Technology.
